issue.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Attribute `localeConfig` is only used in API level 33 and higher (current min is 26)
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-compose than 1.9.3 is available: 1.12.4
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-compose than 2.8.5 is available: 2.9.7
A newer version of androidx.hilt:hilt-navigation-compose than 1.2.0 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.7.0 is available: 1.7.1

A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-view than 1.4.1 is available: 1.5.3

A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-compose than 2.8.7 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences than 1.1.1 is available: 1.2.0
A newer version of androidx.test:core than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.0
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.2.1 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.6.1 is available: 3.7.0
Creating a state object during composition without using `remember`

Formatting %d followed by words ("guardians"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("guardian"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
